approach_rationale: Implement minimum code changes needed to make all 4 E2E journey tests pass and all polish requirements met. Avoid rewriting working systems; fix specific bugs and add missing seams for testability.
assumption_audit: ASSUMED: 'tests/e2e/' is the target dir; playwright.config.ts must be updated from './e2e' to './tests/e2e'
ASSUMED: 'End key' in name-entry spec means Enter/Z confirm (End key is not a game key — likely a typo for 'when done')
ASSUMED: Starter selection journey uses pallet-town NPC/script zones already present in the map JSON
ASSUMED: pre-seeded save states must be written to 'pokebrowser_save_0' (old engine format) because GameEngine.constructor() calls loadGame(0) from engine/SaveSystem.ts
ASSUMED: 'badge[0]=true' in localStorage means the new save-system slot 1 gameState.flags.badges[0] is true
ASSUMED: mobile layout check means canvas is fully visible without scrolling at 375×667 — currently app uses dynamic scale so it SHOULD work
ASSUMED: 'no console errors' means no unhandled promise rejections and no TypeError/ReferenceError in console during tests
ASSUMED: AssetLoader.test.ts and InputManager.test.ts (test files >200 lines) are in scope for the 200-line check per spec
risks: GameEngine.ts is 465 lines and must be split — highest refactor risk, touches core game loop
Save/load integration is split across two incompatible systems; engine reads old format, menu writes new format — tests that inject party Pokemon via localStorage will fail without fixing this
Journey 1 requires script execution (STARTER_TABLE_TRIGGER) which is currently a stub — needs implementation
Name entry letter key handling is currently a stub in GameEngine ('simplified - keyboard chars handled externally') — needs implementation
EncounterSystem hardcodes player Pokemon as Bulbasaur Lv.5 instead of using state.partyPokemon[0] — Journey 2 needs this fixed
Battle ITEM action (Pokeball throw) is not implemented in BattleSystem.handleActionMenu — Journey 2 needs this
Canvas-based game has no DOM test IDs for game states; need to expose state via data attributes or window global
Headless Chromium RAF loop timing may differ; journey tests need robust waits not fixed delays
pokemon.ts (234 lines) and AssetLoader.ts (217 lines) also exceed 200-line limit

files_to_modify.reason: Change testDir from './e2e' to './tests/e2e' to match required test directory
Add data-game-phase, data-map-id, data-party-count attributes to canvas element for E2E test assertions

Split to under 200 lines: extract phase update logic and render logic to separate files; add public state getters; fix name-entry letter key handling; add post-blackout dialog; add frame-time tracker; fix save/load to use new save system
Fix: use state.partyPokemon[0] as player Pokemon instead of hardcoded Bulbasaur Lv.5
Implement ITEM action (Pokeball throw) in handleActionMenu; add POKEMON action stub
Add level-up stat reveal overlay (2s, shows level/stat changes); verify HP lerp is smooth not instant
Add long name truncation with ellipsis for names over 10 characters
Add sinusoidal alpha pulse glow animation for earned badges in renderBadgeCase
Add empty state messages for empty bag and empty PC screens
Verify encounter flash takes exactly 400ms (already time-based at 400ms in BattleRenderer); ensure overworld transition is also consistent
Wire OPTIONS textSpeed setting to DialogSystem speed; fix save to write to engine-loadable slot 0
Split to under 200 lines: move AssetManifest constants to AssetManifest.ts; ensure 404 errors produce colored fallback without uncaught promise rejections
Split to under 200 lines: move learnset data to separate file or compress definitions

steps.title: Branch setup
actions: git checkout -b af/208-e2e-tests-integration-verification-polis/1

steps.title: Update playwright.config.ts
actions: Change testDir to './tests/e2e'
Add mobile viewport project for integration checks

steps.title: Fix save/load integration (critical for Journey 2, 3, 4)
actions: Update GameEngine constructor to load from new save system (systems/SaveSystem.ts load(1)) if available, restoring partyPokemon
Fall back to old engine/SaveSystem.ts slot 0 for backwards compatibility
Ensure save via menu also writes to engine-readable format

steps.title: Expose game state for E2E testing
actions: Add getPhase(), getMapId(), getPartyCount(), getBadgeCount() public getters to GameEngine
In GameCanvas.tsx, update canvas data-game-phase, data-map-id, data-party-count attributes each frame via a ref callback or RAF
Set window.__GAME_DEBUG__ = { phase, mapId, partyCount } for complex queries in page.evaluate()

steps.title: Fix name entry letter key handling
actions: In GameEngine, attach a separate 'keydown' listener that calls dialogSystem.nameAddChar(key) for A-Z chars when dialogSystem.isNameEntry === true
Handle Backspace to call dialogSystem.nameDeleteChar()
Map 'End' key (or just Enter/Z) to confirm the name

steps.title: Implement minimal script execution for starter selection
actions: Create src/game/engine/ScriptHandler.ts to handle PALLET_SCRIPTS
In GameEngine, when result.type === 'SCRIPT', dispatch to ScriptHandler instead of showing stub dialog
STARTER_TABLE_TRIGGER: show dialog with choices; on choice, add species 1/4/7 to party; show STARTER_OBTAINED dialog
RIVAL_COUNTER_AFTER: show dialog, then trigger trainer battle with rival Pokemon

steps.title: Fix EncounterSystem to use party Pokemon
actions: In EncounterSystem.startEncounter(), use state.partyPokemon[0] if available; fallback to Bulbasaur Lv.5 only if party is empty

steps.title: Implement battle ITEM action (Pokeball throw)
actions: In BattleSystem.handleActionMenu(), handle choice === 'ITEM': find first Pokeball in state inventory, use it as CatchSystem attempt
Reduce inventory quantity; push CATCH_ATTEMPT and CATCH_RESULT events to battle
Handle caught Pokemon: add to party (if <6) or PC
End battle if catch successful

steps.title: Add post-blackout dialog
actions: In GameEngine, when all party fainted and lastPokemonCenter exists, show dialog 'You blacked out!' then 'Your Pokemon were restored to full health!' before teleporting to center and healing

steps.title: Split GameEngine.ts to under 200 lines
actions: Extract all phase update switch cases to src/game/engine/GamePhaseUpdater.ts (handles TITLE/DIALOG/BADGE_CEREMONY/TRAINER_BATTLE_INTRO/MENU/OVERWORLD/TRANSITION/BATTLE)
Extract all render switch cases to src/game/engine/GamePhaseRenderer.ts
GameEngine.ts keeps: constructor, start/stop, loop, loadMap, onPhaseChange, renderError — should be ~150 lines
GamePhaseUpdater: pure update logic, ~150 lines
GamePhaseRenderer: pure render logic, ~100 lines

steps.title: Split pokemon.ts and AssetLoader.ts to under 200 lines
actions: Move AssetManifest, TILE_COLORS, SPRITE_SHEET_META constants from AssetLoader.ts to src/game/engine/AssetManifest.ts
AssetLoader.ts retains loadImage, preloadAllAssets, getPokemonSprite, setMapCache logic
pokemon.ts: split learnsets to separate object or compress inline — or extract top 5 species to separate section; either achieves <200 lines

steps.title: Implement level-up stat reveal overlay in BattleRenderer
actions: In BattleRenderer, track levelUpOverlay: { active, pokemon, oldStats, newStats, timer }
On LEVEL_UP event, capture before/after stats and show overlay for 2000ms
Overlay renders: 'BULBASAUR grew to Lv.6!' + stat change lines (ATK/DEF/SPD/SPC before→after)

steps.title: Wire text speed setting to DialogSystem
actions: useSettings hook stores textSpeed; expose via a module-level variable or singleton
In GameEngine, read textSpeed from settings before startDialog() calls and pass to dialog.startDialog(pages, speed)
Verify FAST=16ms/char, NORMAL=40ms, SLOW=80ms all work in DialogSystem

steps.title: Add badge glow animation in MenuRenderer
actions: In renderBadgeCase, for earned badges, draw a sinusoidal alpha overlay: alpha = 0.15 * Math.sin(Date.now() / 400) + 0.15
Only applies to badge slots where badges[i] === true

steps.title: Add long name truncation in DialogRenderer
actions: Create truncateName(name, maxLen=10): string helper
Apply in renderDialog and renderNameEntry for all rendered name strings

steps.title: Add empty state messages in UIRenderer
actions: In renderBagScreen, if no items in selected category, render 'Nothing here.' centered
In PCRenderer (if exists), render 'PC is empty.' if no stored Pokemon

steps.title: Add frame-time tracker in GameEngine.loop()
actions: After computing dt, if dt > 20 log console.warn('Frame budget exceeded: ${dt}ms')
Track frame count for performance reporting

steps.title: Write E2E test files
actions: tests/e2e/new-game-journey.spec.ts: title screen → Oak dialog → name entry (A,S,H) → rival name (G,A,R,Y) → overworld → walk to lab → starter selection → check party count > 0
tests/e2e/wild-catch-journey.spec.ts: inject save with Bulbasaur Lv.5 + 5 Pokeballs → walk Route 1 until encounter → fight/catch → verify outcome
tests/e2e/gym-badge-journey.spec.ts: inject save with Squirtle Lv.15 at Pewter Gym entrance → enter gym → defeat Brock → verify badge ceremony → verify localStorage badge
tests/e2e/team-management-journey.spec.ts: inject save with 2 Pokemon + Potions → open menu → party/item/save → reload → verify state

tests/e2e/integration-checks.spec.ts: localStorage persistence, unavailable storage banner, missing sprite fallback, no hardcoded secrets, no >200-line files, mobile 375px, all 5 menu items functional

steps.title: Run tests and fix failures
actions: npm run test:e2e
Fix any failures discovered
Verify npm test (vitest) still passes

steps.title: Write PR body and integration report
actions: Write .af/tasks/208/pr-body.md
Write .af/tasks/208/integration-report.md with pass/fail for each check

persistence_strategy: localStorage via pokebrowser_save_v1 (new system) for MenuSystem saves; pokebrowser_save_0 (old engine format) for GameEngine load-on-start. Fix: unify GameEngine to preferentially load from new save system. E2E tests inject pre-seeded state via page.addInitScript writing to the key the engine actually reads.
error_handling_approach: All save operations wrapped in try/catch with user-visible StorageWarning banner (already implemented). Missing sprite 404 produces colored fallback rectangle (already in BattleRenderer/OverworldRenderer). Encounter errors caught and logged. Battle system errors caught in try/catch already. Post-blackout healing shows dialog before restoring. Empty party/inventory renders message instead of blank.

production_readiness_checklist.persistence: localStorage with pokebrowser_save_v1 key; survives refresh. Bug fix: unify engine load to use new save system so partyPokemon/inventory/flags are properly restored.
production_readiness_checklist.error_handling: All external calls (save/load, asset loading, encounter) have try/catch. StorageWarning banner for localStorage failures. Sprite 404 → colored fallback. Frame error → renderError() shown on canvas.
production_readiness_checklist.input_validation: Name entry limited to 7 chars by DialogSystem.maxNameLen. Slot validation in save(). No user-facing API calls that need server-side validation (client-only game).
production_readiness_checklist.loading_states: GameCanvas shows LOADING... overlay while engine initializes. 'Loading...' text in BattleRenderer for null battle state. Saving progress bar animation in MenuSystem.
production_readiness_checklist.empty_states: NEED TO ADD: empty bag category → 'Nothing here.'; empty PC → 'PC is empty.'; empty party → already shows empty slots.
production_readiness_checklist.security: No API keys or server calls. No LLM prompts. No user-generated content stored externally. grep check for hardcoded secrets is part of integration-checks.spec.ts.
production_readiness_checklist.component_size: NEED TO FIX: GameEngine.ts (465 lines), pokemon.ts (234 lines), AssetLoader.ts (217 lines) all exceed 200-line limit. Plan: extract to separate files.
production_readiness_checklist.test_coverage: 4 full journey E2E tests + 1 integration check suite. All major happy paths covered. Error scenarios (missing sprite, localStorage unavailable) covered in integration-checks.spec.ts.
